overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a pink sports car driving through Night City at night. The vehicle navigates through futuristic urban streets lined with corporate buildings, overpasses, and neon signage, passing iconic landmarks including the Arasaka and Militech buildings beneath a full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with corporate satellite complex

events.description: car accelerates from a stop and proceeds through the intersection
vehicle passes through the intersection with other cars visible on the road

agents.ego_description: driving a pink sports car through the city intersection, navigating past pedestrians and other vehicles while approaching the Arasaka complex

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing crossing the street from left to right in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: tall dark corporate skyscraper with illuminated vertical ARASAKA signage on the facade
massive futuristic satellite dishes mounted on the roof of the corporate building
large illuminated billboard displaying red and white text advertisements
tall palm tree lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a Night City intersection with the iconic Arasaka building and its massive satellite dishes dominating the skyline ahead. The pink sports car accelerates through the intersection as pedestrians cross the street, with neon billboards and palm trees lining the urban thoroughfare under the full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane avenue lined with palm trees and corporate buildings

events.description: approaching a red traffic light at the intersection ahead
car comes to a complete stop at the red traffic light

agents.ego_description: cruising down the avenue alongside the Arasaka building, slowing down as the car approaches and stops at a red traffic light

entered.detail: holographic advertisement display emitting bright green light on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The car drives down a wide avenue with the Arasaka building now receding to the right, passing rows of palm trees and street lights. As the vehicle approaches an intersection, a glowing green holographic advertisement becomes visible on the right sidewalk before the car stops at the red light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath concrete overpasses with industrial barriers

events.description: entering covered area beneath the overpass system as the car turns right
car executes a right turn at the intersection and accelerates
entering darker section beneath multiple levels of overpass infrastructure

agents.ego_description: waiting at the red light, then executing a right turn and accelerating under the overpass structure, navigating through the covered roadway

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the car at the yellow crosswalk

entered.detail: concrete overpass with metal railings and support columns spanning across the road
yellow and red striped construction barriers lining the right side of the road
industrial corporate building with illuminated MILITECH signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: After waiting at the light, the car turns right and enters a covered roadway beneath massive concrete overpasses. The environment shifts to a darker, industrial setting with construction barriers lining the road and the Militech building becoming visible ahead through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway underpass with industrial infrastructure and overhead walkways

events.description: emerging from the covered roadway into an open intersection beneath the overpasses
stopping at red light at the Militech intersection under the overpass

agents.ego_description: driving through the covered roadway, emerging into a large intersection beneath the overpass system, stopping at the red light facing the Militech building

entered.detail: pedestrian walkway bridge with metal grating crossing above the road
dense network of overhead power lines and cables crisscrossing between buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through the enclosed underpass section, passing beneath multiple levels of highway infrastructure with overhead walkways and industrial wiring. The Militech building looms larger as the car approaches the intersection, eventually stopping at the red light beneath the massive concrete structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district intersection with corporate and factory buildings

events.description: pedestrians crossing in front of the stopped vehicle at the crosswalk
car turns left and accelerates through the intersection into the industrial district

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection as pedestrians cross, then turning left and accelerating through the industrial district with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrians crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk in front of the vehicle while the car waits

entered.detail: tall industrial structures with metal scaffolding, pipes, and corrugated metal siding
tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke against the night sky

segments.scene_description: While stopped at the Militech intersection, pedestrians cross in front of the vehicle before the car turns left into a more industrial area. The scene features factory buildings with smokestacks and heavy industrial infrastructure as the vehicle accelerates away from the corporate district, with the overpass receding into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban intersection that transitions into a steady drive down a wide corporate avenue. It begins with a pink sports car accelerating through a busy crossing, dominated by the massive satellite dishes of the Arasaka building and a full moon hanging over the skyline. As the vehicle moves forward, the towering corporate architecture recedes to the right, giving way to a rhythmic procession of palm trees and glowing street lights. The scene then shifts toward a wide thoroughfare where a vibrant green holographic advertisement emerges on the sidewalk before the car finally comes to a halt at a red light.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a pink sports car transitions from a corporate transit corridor into a gritty industrial district. It begins with the vehicle turning right into a covered roadway, where the environment shifts into a darker setting defined by massive concrete overpasses and construction barriers. As the car drives deeper into the enclosed underpass, it passes beneath layers of highway infrastructure and overhead wiring while the Militech building looms larger through the haze. The scene then pauses at a red light where pedestrians cross the intersection before the vehicle turns left, leaving the corporate towers behind. Finally, the camera follows the car as it accelerates away from the overpasses and into a landscape of factory buildings and smoking smokestacks.
